patterns.message: dwg-viewer (gorunru) -> dwg-metraj (boru/cap) runtime import yasak. Sadece tip import kullanin: import type { ... } from '@/components/dwg-metraj/...'
dwg-viewer dwg-workspace'i import edemez (asagidan yukari). workspace zaten viewer'i import ediyor.
dwg-metraj (boru/cap) -> dwg-viewer (gorunru) runtime import yasak. Sadece tip import kullanin: import type { ... } from '@/components/dwg-viewer/...'
